mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_USER_MENU (USER_ID, MENU_ID, AUTH_CODE, FAVOR_MENU_ORDER, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) VALUES (#{userId}, #{menuId}, #{authCode}, #{favorMenuOrder}, #{now}, #{currentUserId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_USER_MENU WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND MENU_ID = #{menuId}
mapper.select: SELECT um.USER_ID AS "userId", um.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", um.AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", um.FAVOR_MENU_ORDER AS "favorMenuOrder", um.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", um.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId" FROM FWK_USER_MENU um LEFT JOIN FWK_MENU m ON um.MENU_ID = m.MENU_ID WHERE um.USER_ID = #{userId} AND um.MENU_ID = #{menuId}

SELECT um.USER_ID AS "userId", um.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", um.AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", um.FAVOR_MENU_ORDER AS "favorMenuOrder", um.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", um.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId" FROM FWK_USER_MENU um INNER JOIN FWK_MENU m ON um.MENU_ID = m.MENU_ID WHERE um.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY m.SORT_ORDER

SELECT um.USER_ID AS "userId", um.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", um.AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", um.FAVOR_MENU_ORDER AS "favorMenuOrder", um.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", um.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId" FROM FWK_USER_MENU um INNER JOIN FWK_MENU m ON um.MENU_ID = m.MENU_ID WHERE um.USER_ID = #{userId} AND um.FAVOR_MENU_ORDER > 0 ORDER BY um.FAVOR_MENU_ORDER

SELECT um.USER_ID AS "userId", um.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", um.AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", um.FAVOR_MENU_ORDER AS "favorMenuOrder", um.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", um.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId" FROM FWK_USER_MENU um LEFT JOIN FWK_MENU m ON um.MENU_ID = m.MENU_ID WHERE um.MENU_ID = #{menuId}

SELECT um.USER_ID AS "userId", um.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", um.AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", um.FAVOR_MENU_ORDER AS "favorMenuOrder", um.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", um.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId" FROM FWK_USER_MENU um LEFT JOIN FWK_MENU m ON um.MENU_ID = m.MENU_ID WHERE um.USER_ID = #{userId} AND um.AUTH_CODE = #{authCode}
